1113320968589414544:# Iggagi’s Weekly Schedule (Usually)  **Schooldays**  *Every Morning* Get up between 3-7 AM * Get ready at 715 AM Leave at 740 AM  *Lunch* Mondays-Tuesdays - 1135-1205 PM * Wednesdays-Thursdays - 1205-1235 PM *   *End of School* Mondays-Thursdays -  get out at 315 PM,  get in Vans at 325 (ish) PM * Get home between 345-400 PM * Fridays - Get out at 1215 PM Get in Vans at 1225 (ish) PM * Get home between 1245-100 PM *  **”Extracurriculars”** Wednesday - Church Mutual between either 630 or 700 PM to 830 PM * (Leave around 625 or 650 PM) (Get home around 840 PM) Thursday - SNAP Program from 630 to 830 PM (Leave around 615 PM) (Get home around 845 PM) *  **I am usually free Saturdays**  **Sundays** *Church* 1030 AM to 1230 PM (I am usually unavailable Sunday mornings) (Get home between 1230-1245 PM) * (I may have meetings after church, it varies)  **Other** This is all in MST or Arizona Time -# asterisks * show when I am available to text

1411486569386213376:# Operation Blinding Light -# Name pending  Okay so, the basis of the operation goes like this Step 1 Ban Warden. Step 2 Bring a Ying, Lion, Dokkaebi, Finka, and Blitz. -# ALL with stuns, with ying and Blitz bringing smokes. Step 3 Smoke off a window into site using 1-2 of yings smokes, Blitz will rapell in and turtle plant.  Step 4 Win.  **More Details** During the plant, Lion and Dokkaebi will both use their calls. Finka will cover with her lmg and use suppressive fire. ALSO during the plant, each operator (exlcuding ying and blitz) will throw ONE stun grenade, with 1-2 second intervals, as plant takes 7 seconds. This is a total of 3 Stun Grenades. Ying will use TWO of her candellas during the planting process. (One left, One Right) Post Plant, Lion and Dokkaebi will use the rest of their calls, Finka and Ying will be on the window using their lmgs, with Lion and Dokkaebi staying back for emergency support and runouts. Blitz will stay on the defuser at ALL times and will NOT be aggressive, merely flashing when opponents get too close, Blitz is KEY and should only aim if the situation is desperate/calls for it. furthermore post plant, Blitz will periodically throw both his smokes, to conceal, and each operator will take turns throwing stun grenades.  By the end of this, defuser should either defuse, OR all opponents will die in the chaos of suppressive fire.   Now, any questions?
